_comment: Fill in your week, then run: python ../../scripts/weekly_review_synthesizer.py weekly_review_input.json
wins: Closed Acme renewal at expanded scope (+$80K ARR)
Shipped onboarding-flow rebuild — saw 18% lift in activation in first 48 hours
learnings: Customer interview from Tuesday showed our pricing page is being misread — they think the 'Pro' tier excludes API access. Need to fix.
Tried a different cadence for engineering 1:1s (45 min biweekly) — felt rushed; revert to 30 min weekly.

blockers_or_risks.item: Q3 marketing plan is over budget without expanded headcount approval
blockers_or_risks.mitigation: Surface trade-off in Tuesday's exec staff meeting; have option A (cut paid) and option B (delay event)

blockers_or_risks.item: Engineering on-call rotation has only 4 people; risk of burnout if we don't expand
blockers_or_risks.mitigation: Add new hire to rotation in week 3 of onboarding; consider managed on-call vendor for after-hours

okr_progress.objective: Reach $4M ARR by end of Q3

okr_progress.status: at risk — investigate friction in step 3

next_week_priorities: Run pricing-page A/B test fix to address API-tier misread
Q3 marketing plan trade-off conversation in exec staff
Hold first 30-min engineering 1:1 with new senior backend (post-offer accept)
open_loops_to_close: Reply to legal counsel re: contract template revision
Approve expense report from previous week
things_to_decline: Optional partner conference invite — net negative for the week
External recruiter request for 'quick chat' (not hiring at executive level right now)
journal_note: Energy fine despite a tough Q3 marketing budget conversation looming. Watch out for the temptation to over-promise on activation OKR — better to flag risk now than scramble at quarter-end.
